meta.title: 40 Free Security and Development Tools
meta.description: 40 free security and development tools: password generator, AES-256 encryption, breach checker, Base64 converter, and more. No registration required.

heading.title: Security Tools
heading.description: Use our free tools to enhance your digital security and protect your information.

needMore.title: Need more tools?
needMore.description: We are constantly developing new security tools. Follow us to stay updated with the latest additions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Tools
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our security tools.
faq.a1: Yes, all our basic tools are completely free and do not require registration. Some advanced features may require a premium account, but core functionalities are available at no cost.
faq.q2: Is my data stored on your servers?
faq.a2: No, most of our tools process data locally in your browser for security purposes. Data is not sent to our servers, ensuring your privacy and confidentiality.
faq.q3: Can I use the tools completely offline?
faq.a3: Some tools like the password generator work completely offline once loaded. Others that require real-time verification do need an internet connection.
faq.q4: How often do you update the tools?
faq.a4: We regularly update our tools to improve security, add new features, and fix bugs. Updates are deployed automatically without interrupting your experience.
faq.q5: Can I integrate these tools into my website?
faq.a5: We offer APIs and embeddable widgets for some of our tools. Contact our technical team for available integration options.
faq.q6: Are the tools safe for enterprise use?
faq.a6: Yes, our tools are designed following enterprise security standards. We offer premium versions with additional auditing and compliance features tailored for corporate environments.
